title: Every Time I Kiss You
content:
Every time I kiss you
After a long separation
I feel
I am putting a hurried love letter
In a red mailbox.
meaning:
Nizar Qabbani's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Every Time I Kiss You"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
